---
title: "hierarchical-analysis-IA"
format: html
---

```{r}
hz <- read_csv("../../minerva/Hazards/Datasets/DT-hzcats-society-level.csv")

sh <- read_csv("../../2026-Sharing-Analyses/sharing-dataset-for-analysis.csv")
sh <- sh %>% select(ID, allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30, allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA)

hz <- full_join(hz, sh, by = c("ID"))
# remove outliers identified in cluster analysis  

hz <- hz %>% filter(ID != 73 & ID != 218)

IA_vars <- c(
  "allhazards_onset_avg_30",
  "disaster_est_count_30_IA",
  "normative_est_count_30_IA",
  "allhazards_H9a_sev_exposure_30_IA",
  "allhazards_nonfd_sev_exposure2_30_IA"
)


# Keep IDs + original variables
IA_for_clust <- hz %>%
  select(ID, all_of(IA_vars)) %>%
  drop_na(all_of(IA_vars))

IA_for_clust_scaled <- IA_for_clust %>%
  select(all_of(IA_vars)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))))
```


```{r}
dist_mat <- dist(IA_for_clust_scaled)

hc <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "ward.D2")

plot(hc)

fviz_nbclust(
  IA_for_clust_scaled,
  FUNcluster = hcut,
  method = "silhouette",
  hc_method = "ward.D2"
)


```

```{r}
fviz_dend(
  hc,
  k = 3,
  rect = TRUE,
  cex = 0.7,
  main = "Hierarchical Clustering of IA Hazard Variables"
)
```

```{r}
plot(
  hc,
  labels = IA_for_clust$ID,
  main = "Hierarchical Clustering of IA Hazard Variables",
  xlab = "",
  sub = "",
  cex = 0.7,
  lwd = 2
)

# make rectangle/category lines thicker
par(lwd = 3)
rect.hclust(
  hc_final,
  k = 3,
  border = 2:5
)

# reset line width back to normal
par(lwd = 1)
```
